notes.content: 2026-03-19 known active failures from live Vite log /private/tmp/aivalink-frontend.log: src/pages/VTuberPage.tsx had HMR parse errors around the connectWs callback and repeated runtime errors 'useEffect must not return anything besides a function' plus 'TypeError: destroy is not a function'. The file currently has duplicated websocket connection effects, and one effect returns the Promise from connectWs() as cleanup. This likely causes repeated websocket connect/disconnect churn that matches backend log spikes.

directives.directive: When working on VTuber runtime issues, inspect /private/tmp/aivalink-frontend.log first. Treat duplicated connectWs effects and returning a Promise from useEffect cleanup in src/pages/VTuberPage.tsx as the first suspect; coordinate with the sibling backend project aivalink because backend logs already show repeated websocket reconnects and a separate DB schema issue.
